comment: Example of a LEGITIMATE M0 pass. The status is backed by MEASURED evidence (64/64 corpus files decoded byte-exact) plus provenance. A worker cannot emit this without a verifier actually decoding the corpus; the gate rejects a pass lacking metrics or provenance.
comparison: DEFLATE variant with higher-order context modeling
notes: Byte-exact decoder; 64/64 real-world files reconstructed byte-for-byte.
